    </td>

                   <a class="nav" href="https://qis.verwaltung.uni-hannover.de/qisserver/rds?state=wwrite&amp;write=info&amp;from=out&amp;par=old&amp;add.425203=12&amp;asi=ly6JsnKpxHtbhiQQNleE">Info</a>
              </td>
    </tr>
  </table>
         </td>
         </tr></table>
